title: JumpStudy AI — define MVP + big-picture build plan
_comment: General workspace to build the backbone + MVP of JumpStudy AI (an AI tutoring app: Next.js 16 + React 19 + Convex + Clerk + OpenAI Realtime voice + Canvas artifacts). Orchestrator's first job: clearly define what the app needs and how to build it, then produce a big-picture implementation plan for the MVP. FINAL STATE: a documented requirements + architecture definition and a big-picture implementation plan, broken into GitHub issues. SYSTEM OF RECORD: GitHub issues in Jumpsy/JumpStudy-AI via gh (enforced by the orchestrator overlay). REPO: /Users/seanchiu/Desktop/JumpStudy-AI (origin git@github.com:Jumpsy/JumpStudy-AI.git, branch main). WORKTREE: .worktrees/jumpstudy on branch jumpstudy (base main). SESSION: macbook-jumpstudy. ROSTER: central base set (backend/frontend/qa/devops/code-review). Active core for the planning phase is backend-lead + frontend-lead + qa-lead; devops-lead and code-review-lead are deferred until the architecture is frozen.
